tasks.instruction: Read the text below. Decide if each sentence (1.1-1.4) is True (T), False (F), or if the information is Not In the text (NI).
tasks.text:
THE SCHOOL TRIP

Last Friday, Class 4B went on a school trip to the City Zoo. The children left school at 8:30 in the morning and travelled by bus for about forty minutes. When they arrived, their teacher Mrs Wilson gave everyone a map of the zoo. First, they visited the reptile house, where they saw snakes and lizards. Then they walked to the monkey area, which was the children's favourite part. After lunch in the zoo cafe, they watched a show with sea lions. The sea lions could catch balls and jump through hoops. The children took many photos during the trip. They got back to school at 3 o'clock, tired but happy. Everyone agreed it was the best trip of the year.

items.statement: The children went to the zoo on a Monday.
items.explanation: FALSE - The text says 'Last Friday', not Monday.

items.statement: The bus ride to the zoo took about forty minutes.
items.explanation: TRUE - The text says 'travelled by bus for about forty minutes'.

items.statement: The children bought souvenirs at the zoo shop.
items.explanation: NO INFORMATION - The text does not mention a zoo shop or souvenirs.

items.statement: The monkey area was the children's favourite part of the zoo.
items.explanation: TRUE - The text says 'the monkey area, which was the children's favourite part'.
